name: Cinnamon-Roasted Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. With poultry shears or a large, sharp knife, cut the chicken into serving-size pieces.
2. In a bowl, mix together the cinnamon, dried thyme, salt, and pepper.
3. Rub the mixture all over the surface of the chicken pieces.
4. Place the pieces, skin side up, slightly apart in a single layer on a large, nonstick baking pan or two smaller pans that have been lightly greased.
5. Roast in a 375°F (190°C) oven, basting occasionally with pan drippings, for about 1 hour or until juices run clear when the thickest parts of the chicken are pierced and the skin is crisp and browned.
6. Remove from the oven and let rest before serving.
Makes 8 to 10 servings
Preparation time: 20 minutes
Cooking time: about 1 hour
